---
title: Bird people
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779791722/birdpeople2_z7vqpq.png
description: Christmas bird people
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2025-15-05
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1779791722/birdpeople2_z7vqpq.png)
